arts.ttl: Manchester United set up FA Cup final with Chelsea after beating local rivals
arts.sum: The defending champions were good value as they reached their third final in a row.

arts.ttl: Video: Italy star Tonali scores great volley for Newcastle United
arts.sum: Watch as Italy international Sandro Tonali scores with a ferocious volley for Newcastle United in...

arts.ttl: Two Manchester United goalkeeper legends disagree over dropped Andre Onana
arts.sum: Andre Onana was dropped by Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim for the team's trip to Newcastle on Sunday after coming under fire for a succession of mistakes, including being at fault for both goals against Lyon

arts.ttl: Man City 0-2 Man United: Celin Bizet and Grace Clinton help Red Devils book a spot at Wembley for the third consecutive season
arts.sum: The two had played a pivotal role in helping Tottenham to their first ever FA Cup final last season, and today, the two ensured they would be returning to Wembley once again, this time in red.

arts.ttl: You have to let them disconnect – Ruben Amorim explains call to drop Andre Onana
arts.sum: Onana was at fault for both of Lyon’s goals in Thursday’s 2-2 draw.

arts.ttl: Man United icon Gary Neville's Sky Sports absence explained after agreement reached over new job
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Gary Neville is not on Sky Sports this afternoon as the Reds travel to Newcastle in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Man United set to raid Mercedes' F1 team for data supremo as Sir Jim Ratcliffe's backroom rebuild continues
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY MIKE KEEGAN: Manchester United are set to raid Mercedes' F1 team as they seek to turbocharge the data analysis set-up at the club.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Newcastle host struggling Man United in the Premier League
arts.sum: Newcastle look to take a step further to Champions League qualifying as they host a struggling Manchester United. ESPN has live updates.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Why Andre Onana has been dropped as Man United boss Ruben Amorim explains his decision ahead of Newcastle clash
arts.sum: Onana's performances have once again been under the microscope after a recent spell of poor form, which has also prompted a war of words between him and Nemanja Matic.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe 'back to work' hope as Newcastle United star asked about head coach
arts.sum: Newcastle United assistant manager Jason Tindall said that he was awaiting news from hospital on Eddie Howe. Tindall said Newcastle were "waiting for an update" on Howe.
